name: agentic-sop-to-work
description: Marketplace for agentic-sop tooling + cross-domain review companions (methodology skills + kit + project-scoped gate + the Second Opinion honesty reviewer).

plugins.name: agentic-sop-kit
plugins.description: Human-SOP → agentic-workflow methodology: agentic-sop + agentic-workflow-audit skills, the /sop-flow command, a project-scoped Stop-hook regression gate, and the bundled portable kit.

plugins.name: second-opinion-honesty
plugins.description: Independent adversarial honesty reviewer: scrutinizes a DRAFT output's claims-vs-evidence (no fabrication / overreach / invented IDs) before a human approves. Snaps onto agentic-sop-kit run dirs (FULL, uses the trace) or reviews any plain document (DEGRADED). Deterministic checks + a capped advisory LLM pass; the report is a DRAFT — the human owns the verdict.
